# Masomo Now

> Masomo Now is the francophone Africa division of ELIMU International Education Connections, a licensed Canadian education consultancy (RCIC License R731358) helping students from Rwanda, DR Congo, and Djibouti apply to study abroad in Canada, the United States, Ireland, Germany, and Poland.

Masomo Now provides education and immigration consulting: university/college matching, application support, visa and study permit guidance (including Canada's Francophone Minority Communities Student Pilot), pre-departure orientation, and post-arrival settlement support.

## Pages

- [Home](https://masomonow.com/): Overview of Masomo Now and ELIMU International Education Connections.
- [About](https://masomonow.com/about): Company background, team, and in-person seminars across East Africa.
- [Study Destinations](https://masomonow.com/destinations): Real partner schools across Canada, the US, Ireland, Germany, and Poland, with facts and campus videos.
- [Services](https://masomonow.com/services): The six services Masomo Now provides, from first consultation to post-arrival settlement.
- [FMC Student Pilot](https://masomonow.com/fmc-pilot): Details on Canada's Francophone Minority Communities Student Pilot for francophone students.
- [Pathway Finder](https://masomonow.com/pathway-finder): An interactive quiz matching a student's answers to a real destination, school, and eligibility pathway.
- [Cost Calculator](https://masomonow.com/cost-calculator): Estimates tuition and living costs by destination country, program type, and duration.
- [Program Search](https://masomonow.com/programs): Search and filter partner schools by field of study (business, engineering, health, trades, and more).
- [Resources](https://masomonow.com/resources): Articles on study permits, budgeting, test prep, and life abroad.
- [Book a Consultation](https://masomonow.com/consultation): Free consultation booking with a Rwanda-based counselor.
- [Privacy Policy](https://masomonow.com/privacy): What personal information is collected and how it is used.
- [Terms of Use](https://masomonow.com/terms): Terms governing use of this site and its services.
